content:
MODULE: cosmos.health.nutrition
FILE: cosmos/health/nutrition.py (677 lines)
CATEGORY: health

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Nutrition Manager

Comprehensive nutrition tracking with food database, meal logging,
recipe management, and swarm-powered meal planning.

CLASSES:
- DailyNutrition: Daily nutrition totals and breakdown.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- NutritionManager: Manages nutrition tracking, food database, and meal planning.

Features:
- Food 
  Methods: def search_foods(self, query: str, category: Optional[str]=None, limit: int=20) -> List[FoodItem]
  Methods: def get_food(self, food_id: str) -> Optional[FoodItem]
  Methods: def add_food(self, food: FoodItem) -> FoodItem
  Methods: def update_food(self, food_id: str, updates: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[FoodItem]
  Methods: def log_meal(self, meal_type: MealType, foods: List[Dict[str, Any]], notes: str='', timestamp: Optio
  Methods: def get_meals_for_date(self, target_date: date) -> List[MealEntry]
  Methods: def delete_meal(self, meal_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def calculate_daily_nutrition(self, target_date: Optional[date]=None) -> DailyNutrition
